prompt_en: pixel art item icon, 128x128, minimalist dark fantasy, faceted crystal shard with golden-bronze highlights, transparent crystalline gem with sharp angular facets, charcoal background (#1a1a24) with subtle golden coin silhouettes scattered behind, warm gold accent color (#c9a76f) highlighting edges and catching light on crystal planes, high contrast, 16-32bit inspired, atmospheric, muted dark palette, sharp crisp pixels, no blur, centered composition, precious gem, arcane focus stone
